title: PRD: Granular notification controls
text:
# PRD — Granular notification controls
Product area: Notifications
Status: In Review
Author: Product team

## Problem
Customers repeatedly request granular notification controls. This appears in support tickets and NPS feedback for the Notifications area.

## Proposed solution
Implement granular notification controls with configuration in workspace settings.

## Success metrics
Reduce Notifications-related complaints by 30%; adoption > 40% in 60 days.

## Priority
Committed for next quarter.
